propositions: Stamp denormalized author name+email plus an optional author_id onto every local mutating event's envelope.
Provide a shared attribution_fields helper with a repo_root-keyed cache so git-email lookup and identity resolution each run at most once per repo_root.
Stamp attribution at all four local envelope-composing sites (append_event, txn cores, delete writers, compact snapshots) while excluding the inbound Jira reconciler by design.
Surface author_email/author_id as present-only in reduced state at process_create, process_comment, process_revert, and process_signature.
Ensure pre-change events lacking author fields reduce byte-identically with neither key added anywhere.
author_email must return empty string and never raise when git config is unset or the git call errors.
